name: Banishment

spell.name: Banishment
spell.targets: 1 creature that isn't on its home plane

heightened.text: You can target up to 10 creatures. The extra cost affects targets to which it is anathema.

spell.critical_success: The target resists being banished and you are stunned 1.
spell.critical_failure: The target is banished and can't return by any means to the plane it's banished from for 1 week.

text: You send the target back to its home plane. The target must attempt a Will save. You can spend an extra action while Casting this Spell and add a cost to the spell to give the creature a –2 circumstance penalty to its save. The cost must be a specially gathered object that is anathema to the creature. This spell fails if you aren't on your home plane when you cast it.
